title: starlight (2)
body:
- ))}}
    - my sense of time is expansive
my taste in rhyme is expensive
so when i find myself dancing
i ain't trying to be precious
i'm a line in the sand
i'm a lie in the sack
i'm aligned when i stand
i'm a lie when i wax
i'm a lion. facts
i'm a die in the end
i'm a die in my acts
i'm a die broke, dyed hands strapped
i hope my friends know where i'm at
so they can call me when they need a cat
to come through yawning like an abyss
they can peer to without falling in it
and i know i appear to but that's more a slip
don't dock myself i get wet boarding the ship
my car go far but i got more to give
so i go hard at the north star
explore far and wide and write what i eye
if it wasn't for you who knows where i'd be
not me i only be where i am
copy don't make sense if we don't go ham
radio got me close to you
it's up to you if you play me though
but i can't send that note to you
not enough in my register to put my stamp on it
when i blow it out only snow gets to ya
and only snow gets to you ya
i know cuz i'm cold when i don't get ya
sunshine sometimes i really miss ya
so i'm trying to get to ya
but ever since that one time i keep missing ya
